name: THR ADRENALINE MAN
overview: The real and extreme life of Andre "Relentless" Alexsen spans 35 years of real and extreme adventures, ranging from stuntman and daredevil, to wild animal handler and trainer, and working and training with the U.S. military.

trailers.title: THE ADRENALINE MAN  IS ANDRE ALEXSEN MOST EXTREME TV SHOW EVER FILMED, TRAILER , VIDEO , REEL.
